name: multi-subagent-delegation
title: Implement multi-subagent delegation
description: Add bounded multi-child support to delegate_task while preserving the single-task path.
creator: LienJack
notes: Implemented bounded batch delegation with max task/concurrency defaults, per-child timeout/cancellation, deterministic task-index ledger ordering, blocked child capabilities, compact settled batch rendering, sanitized child metadata, docs, and tests. Verified with pnpm --filter @guga-agent/plugin-tools-delegation typecheck, test, build; pnpm typecheck; pnpm test.
